chunks.text: EECS faculty, students, staff and alumni are central to our success as one of the most thriving and distinguished departments on the Berkeley campus.
Browse Faculty: All Faculty, Faculty Awards, In Memoriam, More Faculty Lists, Including current, emeriti, and visiting faculty.
Browse Alumni: EE Distinguished Alumni Award Winners, CS Distinguished Alumni Award Winners, Alumni Entrepreneurial Activities, More Alumni Lists.
Browse Students: Student Organizations, Student Awards, Grad Homepages, More Student Lists, Student organizations and award winners; graduate student directories.
Browse Administration and Staff: Leadership, Staff, Administrative Organizational Chart, Notable Women of EECS.
